name: opportunities.source.crawl-overdue
description: Every 15 min: dispatch sources >=1h past due — ticks the per-source dynamic schedules lost to a closed backpressure gate, a never-activated workflow, or Trustage downtime. Statically synced (SyncFromDir) so it fires even when dynamically-created workflows don't (the 2026-06-03 failure mode). Backpressure-gated and lease-stamped, so it is always safe to fire.
